meaning: adj.易接近的,可到达的,易受影响的,可理解的
examples: The centre is easily accessible to the general public.
The museum is easily accessible by car.
These documents are not accessible to the public.
At 6, 400 feet, the Sunrise Area of Mount Rainier is the highest point accessible by vehicle.
Another 102 sites remain accessible because they were licensed or seeking registration, it said.
